name: TA Wheeling (TravelCenters of America)
description: Full-service TA travel center at I-70 Exit 11 (Dallas Pike) with diesel lanes, a CAT scale, restaurant, showers, laundry, and truck-repair service bays.

name: Dallas Pike Fuel Center
description: Independent fuel and truck stop about 0.1 mile off I-70 Exit 11 offering diesel, gas, a CAT scale, restaurant, general store, and truck parking.
